# dojo-framework

<!-- Human-readable student profile. Generated by AI at first session, updated after every goal_shinsa pass. Do not edit manually. -->

> Dojo is not an app or a web UI. It is a conversation that leaves a trace.
> The study happens inside a Perplexity chat session — GitHub is the persistent memory.
> The AI is the sensei. The student studies. The repo remembers everything.

**Framework:** [dojo](https://github.com/Malstrom/zeroth/tree/main/frameworks/dojo)
